title: Plot collinear protein-match blocks across five Hepatoplasmataceae genomes
summary: Run LOSATP in the browser and combine compatible protein-match anchors into collinear blocks across five Hepatoplasmataceae genomes.

downloads.label: AP027078
downloads.note: Download the complete record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: AP027131
downloads.note: Download the complete record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: AP027133
downloads.note: Download the complete record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: AP027132
downloads.note: Download the complete record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: NZ_CP006932
downloads.note: Download the complete record as a GenBank flat file.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Linear mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and select Linear mode before adding inputs.

manualSteps.title: Upload the five GenBank files
manualSteps.body: Keep the records in the same order as the Gallery command so adjacent comparison tracks match the published example.

media.alt: Linear GenBank input row 1 with AP027078.gb uploaded and the organism, subtitle, region, and LOSAT filename controls visible.
media.caption: The first uploaded row shows AP027078.gb in the Linear input card; repeat the remaining files in the table order.

manualSteps.title: Use browser LOSAT
manualSteps.body: In Pairwise Comparisons, choose Run LOSAT. Set LOSAT Mode to LOSATP.

rows: Auto unless you need to reproduce a fixed thread count

media.alt: Pairwise Comparisons panel with Run LOSAT and LOSATP selected.
media.caption: Select Run LOSAT and set LOSAT Mode to LOSATP.

manualSteps.title: Build collinear blocks
manualSteps.body: In LOSATP settings, set blastp mode to Collinear blocks. Use Orientation + identity for Color mode.
manualSteps.note: These settings combine compatible runs of protein-match anchors from gbdraw similarity groups into collinear blocks.

operations.title: LOSATP collinear controls
operations.body: Open the blastp mode selector and choose Collinear blocks.

media.alt: LOSAT Settings panel with the blastp mode menu open and the Collinear blocks option highlighted.
media.caption: Open blastp mode in LOSAT Settings and choose the highlighted Collinear blocks option.

operations.title: Collinear color mode
operations.body: Open Color mode and choose Orientation + identity.

media.alt: LOSAT Settings panel with the Color mode menu open and the Orientation + identity option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Color mode in LOSAT Settings and choose the highlighted Orientation + identity option.

manualSteps.title: Set the diagram layout
manualSteps.body: Use the ajisai palette, a Middle track layout, curved matches, and a ruler. Center the records, separate the strands, and show GC content and GC skew.

operations.title: Scale style selector
operations.body: Open Scale Style and choose Ruler.

media.alt: Axis and Scale card with the Scale Style menu open and the Ruler option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Scale Style in the Axis & Scale card and choose the highlighted Ruler option.

media.alt: Layout card with Middle track layout and the center alignment, separate strands, GC content, and GC skew options selected.
media.caption: Set Track Layout to Middle and select Align to Center, Separate Strands, Show GC Content, and Show GC Skew.

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const card = [...document.querySelectorAll('.card')].find((node) => node.querySelector('summary')?.textContent?.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().startsWith('Layout')); const summary = card?.querySelector('summary'); const content = card?.querySelector('details > div'); const track = content?.children?.[0]; const options = content?.children?.[1]; if (!app || !summary || !track || !options) throw new Error('Layout controls are unavailable.'); const matches = app.form?.linear_track_layout === 'middle' && app.form?.align_center === true && app.form?.separate_strands === true && app.form?.show_gc === true && app.form?.show_skew === true && app.adv?.pairwise_match_style === 'curve' && String(app.selectedPalette || '') === 'ajisai'; if (!matches) throw new Error('Restored layout settings do not match the tutorial.'); summary.setAttribute('data-capture-tutorial-layout-summary', 'true'); track.setAttribute('data-capture-tutorial-layout-track', 'true'); options.setAttribute('data-capture-tutorial-layout-options', 'true'); track.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' });

manualSteps.title: Generate and inspect the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The first LOSATP search can take time; later runs reuse its results when the input files and LOSAT settings have not changed. The preview should show orientation-colored collinear blocks between adjacent records.

media.alt: Generated five-genome Hepatoplasmataceae preview with red and blue collinear blocks, GC content and skew tracks, a ruler, and the legend.
media.caption: The generated preview shows orientation-colored collinear blocks between five genome records.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('.preview-controls')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('.drawer-toggle')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('footer')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const content = String(app?.results?.[0]?.content || ''); const svg = app?.svgContainer?.querySelector('svg'); if (!svg || !content.includes('block_0024') || !content.includes('data-collinearity-block-id')) throw new Error('Restored collinear SVG does not match the tutorial.'); app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 0.5; if (app.canvasPan) { app.canvasPan.x = 0; app.canvasPan.y = 0; } svg.setAttribute('data-capture-tutorial-overview', 'true');

manualSteps.title: Inspect collinear blocks
manualSteps.body: Click a curved block ribbon between adjacent genomes to inspect its two records, intervals, orientation, and gbdraw group count. Orientation + identity colors separate forward and reverse blocks while retaining identity information.

media.alt: Zoomed Hepatoplasmataceae collinear crop with the highlighted collinear block ribbon and popup.
media.caption: The highlighted block_0024 ribbon remains visible beside its compact plus-orientation summary covering 15 gbdraw similarity groups.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('.preview-controls')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('footer')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (!app?.svgContainer || !document.querySelector("[data-collinearity-block-id='block_0024']")) throw new Error('Collinear block target is unavailable.'); app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.15; app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-110px, -30px) scale(1.15)';

const target = document.querySelector("[data-gbdraw-pairwise-match-id='comparison1_match1']"); const rect = target?.getBoundingClientRect(); if (!target || !rect) throw new Error('Collinear click target is unavailable.'); target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: rect.left + rect.width / 2, clientY: rect.top + rect.height / 2, view: window }));

const popup = document.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup'); const target = document.querySelector("[data-gbdraw-pairwise-match-id='comparison1_match1']"); const text = String(popup?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').toLowerCase(); const rect = target?.getBoundingClientRect(); for (const expected of ['collinearity block', 'block_0024', 'ap027078.1', 'ap027131.1', 'plus', '15']) { if (!text.includes(expected)) throw new Error(`Collinear popup is missing: ${expected}`); } if (!popup || !rect) throw new Error('Collinear target bounds are unavailable.'); popup.style.width = '600px'; const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.clickedPairwiseMatchPos) { const rightX = rect.right + 24; app.clickedPairwiseMatchPos.x = rightX + 600 <= window.innerWidth - 12 ? rightX : Math.max(12, rect.left - 624); app.clickedPairwiseMatchPos.y = Math.max(24, Math.min(window.innerHeight - 600, rect.top - 80)); }

const popup = document.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup'); const sections = Array.from(popup?.querySelectorAll('.pairwise-match-popup-section') || []); const summaryTitle = sections[0]?.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup-section-title'); const summaryRows = Array.from(sections[0]?.querySelectorAll('.pairwise-match-popup-row') || []).slice(0, 5); const coveredTitle = sections[1]?.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup-section-title'); const coveredRow = sections[1]?.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup-row'); if (!popup || !summaryTitle || summaryRows.length !== 5 || !coveredTitle || !coveredRow) throw new Error('Compact collinear summary not found.'); popup.children[0]?.setAttribute('data-capture', 'collinear-popup-header'); summaryTitle.setAttribute('data-capture', 'collinear-summary-title'); summaryRows.forEach((row, index) => row.setAttribute('data-capture', `collinear-summary-row-${index + 1}`)); coveredTitle.setAttribute('data-capture', 'collinear-covered-title'); coveredRow.setAttribute('data-capture', 'collinear-covered-row');

postGenerationEdits.title: Inspect a CDS feature
postGenerationEdits.body: Click the DnaA CDS and open Details to inspect its label, record ID, feature type, location, gbdraw group ID, and protein ID.

media.alt: Highlighted DnaA CDS beside a compact Details popup with its AP027078.1 record ID, feature type, location, gbdraw group ID, and protein ID.
media.caption: The Details tab identifies the DnaA CDS as a member of gbdraw group og_1 in AP027078.1.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('.preview-controls')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('footer')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (!app?.svgContainer || !document.querySelector('[data-gbdraw-feature-id=fe826bac7]')) throw new Error('DnaA feature target is unavailable.'); app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.15; app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-90px, -30px) scale(1.15)';

const popup = document.querySelector('.feature-popup'); const target = document.querySelector("[data-gbdraw-feature-id='fe826bac7']"); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (!popup || !target) throw new Error('DnaA popup bounds are unavailable.'); popup.style.width = '600px'; if (app?.clickedFeature) app.clickedFeature.activeTab = 'details'; if (app?.clickedFeaturePos) { app.clickedFeaturePos.x = 12; app.clickedFeaturePos.y = 70; }

const popup = document.querySelector('.feature-popup'); const text = String(popup?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').toLowerCase(); for (const expected of ['chromosomal replication initiator protein dnaa', 'ap027078.1', 'cds', '101..1513 (+)', 'og_1', 'bdu67348.1']) { if (!text.includes(expected)) throw new Error(`Feature popup is missing: ${expected}`); } const labels = ['Record ID', 'Feature type', 'Location', 'Orthogroup ID', 'Protein ID']; const detailRows = Array.from(popup?.querySelectorAll('.feature-popup-body .border-b') || []); const rows = labels.map((label) => detailRows.find((row) => row.firstElementChild?.textContent?.trim() === label)); if (rows.some((row) => !row)) throw new Error('Compact DnaA detail rows not found.'); popup.children[0]?.setAttribute('data-capture', 'dnaa-popup-header'); popup.children[1]?.setAttribute('data-capture', 'dnaa-popup-tabs'); rows.forEach((row, index) => row.setAttribute('data-capture', `dnaa-popup-row-${index + 1}`));

losatTips.title: Start with Auto execution
losatTips.body: Auto uses threaded LOSAT only when the browser supports it and the workload justifies it.

losatTips.title: Prefer Safe total threads
losatTips.body: Safe leaves some logical CPUs unused so the browser can remain responsive.

losatTips.title: Keep Threads per run on Auto
losatTips.body: Auto lets the app balance parallel pair runs and per-run LOSATP threads from the selected total thread budget.

losatTips.title: Use Serial when the browser is constrained
losatTips.body: If threaded execution is unavailable or the tab becomes unresponsive, switch Execution to Serial or lower the thread budget.

losatTips.title: Reuse the cache
losatTips.body: The app reuses LOSAT results when the input files and LOSAT settings have not changed, so styling edits avoid another search.

troubleshooting.title: Threaded LOSAT is unavailable
troubleshooting.body: Use Auto or Serial execution. Some browser contexts disable SharedArrayBuffer or cross-origin isolation, which prevents threaded WebAssembly.

troubleshooting.title: The first run is slow
troubleshooting.body: LOSATP processes five genomes in the browser. Wait for the first cache entry before making styling-only changes.

troubleshooting.title: The output is cluttered
troubleshooting.body: Raise Min block genes or the identity threshold to retain fewer blocks, then regenerate.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Check input order, Color mode, Pairwise Match Style, Align to Center, Separate Strands, Show GC Content, and Show GC Skew.
